summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LOGITAG Hybrid Toggle Table/Cards feature (Option D). All requested features are working correctly: login flow, KPI cards display, detail view opening, toggle between Tableau/Cartes modes, card grid rendering, search functionality, and close buttons.

minor.impact: Real-time features affected but core functionality works

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 server responses during initial load

minor_warnings.issue: Missing unique 'key' props in list components

passed_tests: Login flow with admin/user@1234 credentials - redirects to /tagdashboard/index
Dashboard displays 4 KPI cards: Engins tagués (28/5937), Tags utilisés (29/53), Engins sur site (1/5937), Tags à maintenir (1/53)
Clicking KPI card opens detail view below the cards
Toggle Tableau/Cartes visible with correct styling (Cartes active by default in blue)
Clicking 'Tableau' toggle shows DataTable with columns (ID TAG, LABEL2, FAMILLE, ADRESSE, STATUS, ACTIF)
Clicking 'Cartes' toggle shows card grid view
Tag cards display correctly: ID Tag, BLE chips, Disponible badges, Actif status
Engin cards display correctly: photo/placeholder, status badges (LIVRÉ, RÉCEPTION), tag chips (QR taille, BLE), battery %, location
Search bar filters cards and updates result count (24 -> 20 when searching 'BLE')
Back arrow button closes detail view and returns to KPI cards only
X close button closes detail view and returns to KPI cards only

data-testid attributes properly implemented: dashboard-table, detail-close-btn, detail-title, view-toggle, toggle-table-btn, toggle-cards-btn, detail-search-input, result-count, card-grid, tag-card-*, engin-card-*
critical_code_review_comments: Minor React warnings about non-boolean attributes and missing keys should be addressed for cleaner console output
External API (omniyat.is-certified.com) is slow (10-15 seconds) - consider adding loading indicators if not already present
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hybrid Toggle Table/Cards feature (Option D) fully tested and working. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented. External API is slow (10-15 seconds for data load). Login credentials: admin/user@1234. KPI cards: Engins tagués, Tags utilisés, Engins sur site, Tags à maintenir. Toggle between Tableau (table) and Cartes (cards) views works correctly. Search filters cards and updates count. Both close buttons (back arrow and X) work correctly.

hybrid_toggle_view.toggle_buttons: Working - Tableau/Cartes with blue active state
hybrid_toggle_view.cards_view: Working - displays tag cards with BLE/QR chips, status badges
hybrid_toggle_view.table_view: Working - displays DataTable with sortable columns
